MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Robert C. Chiles for plaintiff and moving party: Krisna of Mountain View Inc.

No Other Appearance. Plaintiff Krisna of Mountainview Inc.'s application for a right to attach order is Granted. ORDER SIGNED. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN

Plaintiff'S Ex Parte Application For Tpo In Re: Writ Of Attachment
Off Calendar Nov-08-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES: Atty. Robert C. Chiles for plaintiff and moving party Krisna of Mountain View Inc.;
Atty. Leon Jon Bonney for the defendant American Hotels Inc.

Hearing Held. The tentative ruling was adopted with modifications.
Plaintiff Krishna of Mountain View's ex parte application for a temporary protective order is granted. The order shall remain in effect until November 22, 2006. Undertaking in the amount of $100,000.00. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN
